issues.description: Target scope is 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but card text says 'Return up to 1 Character' with no player restriction. Should be 'ChooseCharacter' to allow targeting any character (yours or opponent's).

Missing condition for the cost requirement. Effect requires '① (You may rest the specified number of DON!! cards in your cost area)' which should be represented as a cost condition or payment mechanic. Current DSL has no representation of the optional DON payment.
